scripts.preprisma: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const dbPath=path.resolve('prisma/dev.db'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dbPath),{recursive:true}); fs.closeSync(fs.openSync(dbPath,'a')); console.log('DATABASE_URL=file:' + dbPath);"
scripts.db:generate: node -e "const {execSync}=require('node:child_process'); const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const dbPath=path.resolve('prisma/dev.db'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dbPath),{recursive:true}); fs.closeSync(fs.openSync(dbPath,'a')); const env={...process.env, DATABASE_URL: process.env.DATABASE_URL || ('file:' + dbPath)}; execSync('prisma generate', {stdio:'inherit', env});"
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "const {execSync}=require('node:child_process'); const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const dbPath=path.resolve('prisma/dev.db'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dbPath),{recursive:true}); fs.closeSync(fs.openSync(dbPath,'a')); const env={...process.env, DATABASE_URL: process.env.DATABASE_URL || ('file:' + dbPath)}; execSync('prisma migrate deploy', {stdio:'inherit', env});"
